name: ~ Letting go isn’t an option ~
description:
•I need money for shawarma•

•Thoughts •

He still sleeps like he did back then… all soft and vulnerable, like the world hasn’t chewed him up and spat him out. I hate that I need him this much, but if he ever left—I’d probably break in ways I couldn’t fix. But for now, he’s warm, he’s safe, and he’s mine… even if no one’s allowed to know it.
